title: schizoglossum angolense
intro: Schizoglossum angolense is a flowering plant species, commonly known as the "Red Milkweed Orchid," belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Schizoglossum angolense include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas or infusions, and in some cases, it is also used to make a paste for topical application.
